mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : CrsCtgrDAO.selectParCrsCtgrCd 설 명 : 과목 분류 부모값 조회 */
SELECT B.CRS_CTGRCD AS crsCtgrCd , B.ORG_ID AS orgId , B.UP_CRS_CTGR_ID AS parCrsCtgrCd , B.CRS_CTGRNM AS crsCtgrNm , B.CRS_CTGR_EXPLN AS crsCtgrDesc , IFNULL(( SELECT A.CRS_CTGRNM FROM TB_LMS_CRS_CTGR A WHERE A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND A.CRS_CTGRCD = B.UP_CRS_CTGR_ID),'ROOT') AS parCrsCtgrNm , B.CRS_CTGR_LV AS crsCtgrLvl , B.CRS_CTGR_SEQ AS crsCtgrOdr , B.USEYN AS useYn , B.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , B.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , B.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , B.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_CRS_CTGR B WHERE B.CRS_CTGRCD = #{crsCtgrCd}

/* SQL ID : CrsCtgrDAO.selectParCreTmCtgrCd 설 명 : 테마별 분류 부모값 조회 */
SELECT B.THM_ID AS creTmCtgrCd , B.ORG_ID AS orgId , B.PAR_CRE_TM_CTGR_CD AS parCreTmCtgrCd , B.CRE_TM_CTGR_NM AS creTmCtgrNm , B.CRE_TM_CTGR_DESC AS creTmCtgrDesc , IFNULL((SELECT A.CRE_TM_CTGR_NM FROM TB_LMS_CRE_TM_CTGR A WHERE A.ORG_ID = B.ORG_ID AND A.THM_ID = B.PAR_CRE_TM_CTGR_CD),'ROOT') AS parCreTmCtgrNm , B.CRE_TM_CTGR_LVL AS creTmCtgrLvl , B.CRE_TM_CTGR_ODR AS creTmCtgrOdr , B.USEYN AS useYn , B.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , B.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , B.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , B.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_CRE_TM_CTGR B WHERE B.THM_ID = #{creTmCtgrCd}
